title: Increase in Atal Pension Yojana payout? PFRDA chairman says evaluation on — Here's all you need to know
summary: The PFRDA is assessing the demand to increase the monthly pension cap under the APY from ₹5,000, according to PFRDA Chairman S Ramann. The subscriber base is projected to exceed 10 crore in FY27, showing an 18% growth.&nbsp;

title: Overdraft vs Personal Loan: What is the difference and how to choose the right one for you?
summary: An overdraft is a credit facility generally offered by banks and financial institutions, primarily to business owners to manage short-term financial requirements related to their operations.

title: Income-tax return forms released: Here's all you need to know about ITR-1 Sahaj — Top FAQs answered
summary: The Income-Tax department has released ITR forms for AY27/FY26, enabling offline preparation via Excel Utility for ITR-1 and ITR-4. Taxpayers can file returns online through the official portal, with a deadline for individual filings set for 31 July 2026.

title: What happens when you close your loan early? All you need to know about prepayment charges
summary: Repaying a loan ahead of schedule can help reduce the total interest payable and shorten the duration of your debt.

title: 8th central pay commission: Roll-out takes years — Here's why central government employees may get pay hike only in 2027
summary: The 8th Central Pay Commission has started consultations with employee representatives to recommend salaries and allowances for central government employees and pensioners. Here's why central government employees may get pay hike only in 2027…

title: 75.5% of Indians lack a retirement plan, while 77% avoid financial advice: 1 Finance survey
summary: A growing retirement planning gap in India is raising concern as 75.5% of middle-aged earners lack a detailed plan while 77% have not sought financial advice, reveals a 1 Finance survey.

title: Hindu Undivided Family: Who is eligible to form HUF and how much tax can be saved?
summary: HUF is treated as a separate taxable entity from its family members. Family income can be legally divided and reported under the HUF to avail additional tax advantages

title: 8th Pay Commission: Check how the fitment factor could raise basic pay to over ₹68,000 and its historical trend
summary: 8th Pay Commission fitment factor discussions are reshaping salary expectations as India’s pay commission history highlights major changes in government pay, pensions and employee benefits over decades.

title: Fixed Deposits: Can you save tax on FD interest? Key rules every depositor should know
summary: Interest earned on fixed deposits is treated as ‘Income from Other Sources’ under income tax rules. It gets added to your total annual income and taxed according to the income tax slab applicable to you.

title: Dearness Allowance demands: Employee representative groups demand inflation-linked compensation, 4% hike — Details
summary: DA demands: Here's what the big three employee groups — NC-JCM, AIDEF and Maharashtra Old Pension Organisation — are demanding for Dearness Allowance. From inflation-linked compensation, 4% hike, merger and more, here's all we know…

summary: Thomas Barkin, a representative of the Federal Reserve, remarked that the Fed's approach to adjusting interest rates will hinge on how effectively businesses and consumers navigate the prevailing economic hurdles. title: Paytm block deal: SAIF Partners, others likely to sell stake worth Rs 963 crore, says report
summary: Paytm's existing investors are expected to sell shares in a block deal. The transaction will involve approximately 8.6 million shares. The floor price is set at Rs 1,120.65 per share. This stake sale is anticipated to be worth $100 million. Citi is reportedly managing the placement. This comes after

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
summary: Nifty ended marginally lower as IT and FMCG weakness offset gains in autos, metals and realty. Analysts flagged resistance near key moving averages and bearish momentum. Markets remain rangebound, with crucial support near 23,400 and resistance around 23,800–23,900 levels.

title: GAIL Q4 results: PAT falls 15% QoQ to Rs 1,485 crore; co declares Rs 0.5 dividend
summary: GAIL reported a Q4 consolidated PAT of Rs 1,485 crore, down 15% sequentially. The company declared a Rs 0.5 dividend. For FY26, consolidated PAT fell sharply by 39% to Rs 7,582 crore, mainly due to global energy headwinds, despite resilient operational volumes.

title: Musk's SpaceX bonus comes with unique condition: colonize Mars
summary: SpaceX's blockbuster IPO filing included some out of this world details, including a provision that founder Elon Musk's massive bonus only kicks in if one million humans settle on Mars. Musk's bonus is contingent on SpaceX's stock market value hitting targets ranging from $400 billion to $6 trillion

title: Market Trading Guide: Buy MTAR Tech & Angel One on Friday for gains up to 12%
summary: The Nifty faces continued weakness, resisting 20EMA, with key support at 23,400. Experts recommend two stocks to buy on dips for near-term gains: MTAR Tech (Target Rs 8,650, 12% upside) and Angel One (Target Rs 370, 9% upside). Both show strong bullish technical breakouts.

title: LG Electronics Q4 Results: PAT falls 8% YoY to Rs 693 crore despite 8% revenue growth
summary: LG Electronics India reported a net profit of Rs 693 crore for the March quarter, an 8% year-on-year increase, with revenue rising to Rs 8,054 crore. summary: The revenue growth was led by sales in Asia, the company said, with particular ‌strength in China ⁠during the ⁠Lunar New Year. title: Max Healthcare Q4 results: Cons PAT grows 7% YoY to Rs 342 crore, revenue rises 12%
summary: Max Healthcare Q4FY26 consolidated PAT grew 7% YoY, and revenue increased 12%. Network EBITDA rose 8%. Max Lab and Max@Home saw strong double-digit growth. The company also recommended a final dividend of Rs 2 per equity share for the year.

title: US stocks today: US stocks slips as oil jumps on renewed Mideast concerns
summary: Wall Street slipped as oil prices jumped after Iran signaled a tougher nuclear stance, raising fears of prolonged supply disruption. Rising Treasury yields and weak corporate cues, including Walmart’s outlook, added pressure, offsetting strong economic data.
